subcodes.first_line: A Book which We have sent down in truth, that it may draw mankind unto the Most Exalted Horizon and bring them nigh unto the Most Great Ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق لیجذب الناس الی الافق الاعلی و یقربهم الی البحر الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude
